article_title: Adaptation and the Migration of Stories Across Media
adaptation_context: brand continuity reset and nostalgia-driven remake audit

review.governance_note: High-priority adaptation governance review required. Adaptation integrity is limited. Strengthen source-core preservation, medium fit, transformation purpose, context preservation, reception value, and ethical governance. Franchise drift is elevated. Review repetition, lore excess, nostalgia reliance, continuity saturation, market overextension, and weak story purpose. Consent/context strength is limited. Review authorization, source authority, cultural context, provenance, and governance. Escalate. Reboot appears driven by brand recognition and nostalgia more than story purpose.

review.governance_note: High-priority adaptation governance review required. Adaptation integrity is limited. Strengthen source-core preservation, medium fit, transformation purpose, context preservation, reception value, and ethical governance. Transfer loss is elevated. Review voice loss, interiority loss, context loss, provenance loss, agency loss, and governance review. Franchise drift is elevated. Review repetition, lore excess, nostalgia reliance, continuity saturation, market overextension, and weak story purpose. AI adaptation risk is elevated. Review plot-summary dependence, voice/style imitation, context loss, synthetic opacity, uncertainty erasure, and human review. Consent/context strength is limited. Review authorization, source authority, cultural context, provenance, and governance. Escalate. Generated adaptation preserves plot shape while losing voice, context, provenance, and human judgment.
